Get in Touch · Musanze, Rwanda

Talk to a real person.

Whether you have booking questions, art inquiries, or partnership proposals, our team in Musanze is ready to help you discover the magic of Rwanda.

We improved communication clarity so travelers, buyers, and partners can immediately choose the correct path.

Send a message

We'd love to hear from you.

Fill in the form and we'll get back to you. For urgent booking requests, WhatsApp is fastest.

Visit us

Two hours from Kigali.

We're on Kinigi Road in Musanze, a short drive from the entrance to Volcanoes National Park. Drop by during a trek or arrange a meeting in advance.

Our location

Musanze, Kinigi Road
Near Volcanoes National Park
Northern Province, Rwanda

Email

hello@volcanoartsandhospes.com

WhatsApp & phone

Fastest for booking questions. Daytime (CAT, UTC+2).

Chat on WhatsApp +250 788 883 986

Live messaging

Need immediate guidance? Open live messaging and chat directly with our support team.

Languages

English & French. Kinyarwanda for cultural sessions.

For tour operators

Bring your travelers to Musanze.

Partner pricing, group-itinerary builder, JWT-secured API. We work with safari operators, cultural-tourism agencies, and educational programs running 1–30+ guest groups.
